raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "A plastic bag has an average lifespan of 12 minutes before it is discarded.",
    "Plastic bags can clog sewage drains and contaminate drinking water.",
    "Plastic bags can degenerate into toxic microplastics that can persist in oceans and landfills for up to 1,000 years.",
    "In California alone, over 300,000 plastic grocery bags have been collected from beaches during Coastal Cleanup Day in the last three decades.",
    "Single-use plastic bags are among the most common items found on beaches and waterways.",
    "Plastic pollution damages coasts, communities, and human health.",
    "Plastic bags are one of the most common single-use plastics harming ocean wildlife, including endangered sea turtles.",
    "Plastic bag bans have been effective in reducing plastic pollution.",
    "Thicker plastic bags produced by the plastics industry can circumvent the intent of plastic bag bans.",
    "Few people actually reuse thicker plastic bags, leading to environmental harm similar to that of thinner bags."
  ]
}
```
